{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Silver sickle
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Charity]]'s weapon is a silver sickle that buzzes and blurs.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4">''Bloodline'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
